step_rationale: Chromatin regulator; neuronal/general transcription factor, no atherothrombotic mechanism.
mechanism: Repressor element-1 silencing transcription factor; general chromatin remodeling, unrelated to atherothrombosis.

omics_datasets.title: Functional characterization of GWAS findings highlights a role for REST in endothelial plasticity and atherosclerosis [CUT&TAG]
